description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-section layout with a predominantly white exterior and numerous rectangular windows distributed across all visible sides. The structure appears to be a single-story building with a flat roof, and the arrangement of rooms is visible from above, revealing a mix of open living spaces and private rooms. The front facade includes a set of three garage doors, suggesting ample parking space, while the rear and side elevations show additional rooms and possibly a patio or utility area. The window arrangement is mostly symmetrical, providing a balanced and orderly appearance. The interior floors are finished with a wood-like material, and the kitchen area is distinguishable by its cabinetry and appliances. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and symmetrical window arrangement. Features include a three-car garage, visible interior rooms, and wood-finished floors.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial front of the house, highlighting the white exterior, multiple windows, and a glimpse into the interior living spaces.
description_view_1: The front view displays the three-car garage, main entry area, and a clear look at the interior layout, including the kitchen and living spaces.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals additional rooms, a continuation of the flat roof, and more windows, emphasizing the house's elongated shape.
description_view_3: This side view provides a look into the kitchen and adjacent rooms, with visible cabinetry and interior details.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, no porch, and a three-car garage as a prominent feature
